'''RuuR'Ur''' was a [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raider]] who camped out at the [[Canyon Dune Turn/Legends|Canyon Dune Turn]], taking shots at the podracers during the [[Boonta Eve Classic/Legends|Boonta Eve Classic]] in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].
